examples.title: Fill First Street with Beepers (Fencepost-Safe)
examples.description: Demonstrates a correct fencepost pattern: place on entry, then move-and-place until the wall.
examples.pseudocode:
1. Put a beeper on the starting corner.
2. While the front is clear:
   a. Move forward one corner.
   b. Put a beeper.

examples.title: Climb a Single Hurdle
examples.description: Shows decomposition and conditionals to get over one wall directly in front of Karel.
examples.pseudocode:
1. If the front is blocked, climb the hurdle:
   a. Turn left and move up one.
   b. Turn right and move forward past the wall.
   c. Turn right and move down one.
   d. Turn left to restore original facing.

examples.title: Sweep First Street: Pick Up All Beepers
examples.description: Traverses a row, picking beepers on every corner, including the last (fencepost-aware).
examples.pseudocode:
1. Pick a beeper if present on the starting corner.
2. While the front is clear:
   a. Move forward one corner.
   b. Pick a beeper if present.
